title: D2.15 -  Workshop Report 2: Practical Steps to Supporting Best Practice in Citizen Science
author: Kat Austen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This document is a summary of the workshops carried out up to and including the ACTION Accelerator Kick-off Workshop. It describes the topics covered and the outcomes of the workshops.
